item.description:
Location: London
Description:

An Electrical Technical Officer (ETO) shore-based position is available in London. This role focuses on marine engineering with an electrical specialization. Further details regarding joining date, contract duration, and salary are not specified in the original post.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Shore Job in London at Transport for London

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Marine Electrician Journeyman I-V position is available. This role involves electrical work within the maritime industry. Further details regarding specific duties, contract terms, and location are available via the application link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Electrician Job - Journeyman I-V at Propulsion Controls Engineering (PCE)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An electrician position is available for Indonesian seafarers to join vessels. Candidates must possess relevant experience. Interested applicants are invited to submit their resumes via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job Opportunity at PT Asia Marine Temas

item.description:
Location: Aberdeen
Description:

A permanent position for a skilled Marine Electrician is available in Aberdeen, offering an annual salary between £45,000 and £49,000. The role requires offshore experience, a time-served apprenticeship, and comprehensive knowledge of AC/DC and LV electrical systems. Responsibilities include installation, maintenance, inspection, and repair of electrical systems on marine assets, fault diagnosis, and preventative maintenance activities.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Electrician Job - Offshore Sector at Charlotte White

item.description:
Location: Kuala Lumpur
Description:

A Lead Electrical and Instrumentation Engineer is sought for ship newbuilding projects, based in Kuala Lumpur with potential assignments at major shipyards. The role encompasses the entire project lifecycle from initiation to ship delivery. Requires a minimum of 8 years' experience in LNGC and Oil Tanker E&I design or drawing appraisal, or relevant experience in newbuilding, conversion, retrofitting, or drydocking. A degree in Electrical or Electronic Engineering, or onboard electrician experience, is necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Lead Engineer Job - Ship Newbuilding at MISC Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrical Technical Officer (ETO) is sought for a container vessel. The contract duration is 2 months, with embarkation scheduled for July 30, 2026. Key vessel details include its type (CONT), DWT, year of build, and flag. This role offers an opportunity for qualified seafarers to join a professional maritime operation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Job on Container Vessel at Columbia Shipmanagement Ukraine Dry Fleet

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A container vessel is seeking an experienced Electrician. Qualified candidates with relevant experience are encouraged to apply. Further details regarding joining date, contract duration, and salary will be provided during the application process.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on Container Vessel at PT Asia Marine Temas

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrical Engineer is sought for a Container Ship with a capacity of 9200 TEU. The joining date is scheduled for the end of July 2026, with a contract duration of 4 months. The monthly salary offered is $7500.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Engineer Job on Container Ship at ENESEL LTD

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Electronic Technicians are sought for roles involving the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of marine electronics, control, and automation systems on offshore marine construction vessels. The position requires hands-on experience with marine communication, navigation, and entertainment systems, PLC-based control systems, and various industrial electronic equipment. A Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of two years of relevant experience are necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electronic Technician Job on Offshore Construction Vessels at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Electronics Technicians are sought for roles involving the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of marine electronics, control, and automation systems on offshore marine construction vessels. The position requires a Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience, with a focus on marine communication, navigation, and automation systems.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electronics Technician Job on Offshore Construction Vessels at Libra International Services
